name: Allied
description: Actively supports and cooperates with the faction

name: Enemy
description: Opposed to the faction; in open or hidden conflict

name: Neutral
description: Neither allied nor hostile; indifferent to the faction

name: Unaware Of
description: Does not know this faction exists

name: Member
description: A rank-and-file member of the faction

name: Leader
description: Leads or commands the faction or a division of it

name: Agent
description: Covert operative acting on behalf of the faction

name: Informant
description: Secretly feeds information to the faction

name: Defector
description: Formerly a member; now estranged or turned against them

name: Captive
description: Held by the faction against their will

name: Sympathiser
description: Not a member but broadly shares the faction's goals

name: Rival
description: Competes with the faction without outright hostility
